name: AIBOM: top-level metadata.timestamp is ISO-8601 UTC; metadata.tools includes the plugin id+version
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && grep -E "\"timestamp\":\"20[0-9]{2}-.*Z\"" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && grep "claude-tdd-pro" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
